rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Gov't Code §2308.3155 governs the Texas Rising Star child care rating system. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative overlap.
quote: The Texas Rising Star Program is a quality-based child care rating system of child care providers participating in the commission's subsidized child care program.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
